assertionResults.title: SampleApp contract matches real claimed diagnostics
assertionResults.reason: The focused verifier rerun passed for SampleApp, and the direct Release rebuild emitted SampleApp.sarif with 89 SARIF results while preserving the claimed DI diagnostics contract.

assertionResults.title: DI015InAction keeps its broken-vs-fixed unresolved-dependency contrast
assertionResults.reason: The focused verifier rerun passed for DI015InAction, and the direct Release rebuild emitted exactly the documented broken DI015 warnings while the verifier confirmed the fixed configuration stayed clean.

assertionResults.title: Published sample claims agree with observed diagnostics
assertionResults.reason: The freshness check passed and the focused freshness tests all passed, indicating sample files and published sample-backed mappings remain readable and aligned with the current surface.

assertionResults.title: Rule-page sample extraction cannot silently drop missing snippets
assertionResults.reason: check-freshness passed and the RulePageSnippets_AllSymbolsAndMarkersExtract_NoSilentDrop test passed in the focused rerun.

assertionResults.title: Sample rule coverage and mapping sets stay in parity
assertionResults.reason: check-freshness reported that the canonical public diagnostic inventory (17 ids, 16 outward-facing after 1 approved alias/omission adjustment) matched 16 SampleApp diagnostic directories and 16 sample/docs mappings.

assertionResults.title: SampleApp build is the canonical sample-diagnostics contract
assertionResults.reason: The direct SampleApp Release rebuild produced SampleApp.sarif and the focused SampleDiagnosticsVerifier test passed on rerun, confirming the sample build remains the canonical contract surface.

assertionResults.title: Repository validation gates fail when analyzer, sample, or docs state diverges
assertionResults.reason: The canonical validation chain completed in order with exit code 0 for sync-readme, solution build, solution test, and site generation, demonstrating the combined gate is wired and currently green.

commandsRun.summary: Initial focused verifier run failed once with a non-reproduced SampleApp DI012b anchor mismatch while DI015InAction still passed.
Freshness check passed; the public diagnostic inventory matched SampleApp directories and sample/docs mappings.
SampleApp rebuilt successfully and emitted SampleApp.sarif (89 total SARIF results; 33 warnings, 0 errors in build output).
DI015InAction rebuilt successfully and emitted DI015InAction.sarif with the two expected broken-case DI015 warnings.
README install snippets were already in sync.
Release solution test run succeeded with 390 passing tests.
Static docs site generation succeeded under the evidence directory.
Focused rerun succeeded with 6 passing sample verifier/freshness tests, including SampleApp and DI015InAction contract checks.

frictions.description: The first focused SampleDiagnosticsVerifierTests run failed once with DI012b secondary-diagnostic anchor mismatches in SampleApp even though the later full solution test run and a focused rerun both passed.
frictions.resolution: Rebuilt the sample projects and ran the canonical gate, then reran the focused sample tests; the mismatch did not reproduce and all assigned assertions passed.
